scope: Port provider-aware session cost tracking, formatting, persistence, and exit-summary hooks into AgenC sidecars

rows.target: runtime/src/session/cost.ts + runtime/src/session/event-log.ts + runtime/src/session/session.ts + runtime/src/session/turn-context.ts + runtime/src/llm/types.ts + runtime/src/llm/wire/* + runtime/src/llm/providers/* + runtime/src/phases/stream-model.ts + runtime/src/bin/bootstrap.ts
requiredBehaviors: accumulate token usage by provider and model instead of model string alone
resolve provider-specific pricing before model-family fallback
treat local providers as zero-cost even when their model slug matches a paid hosted model
record unknown-cost models while applying a conservative fallback price
price cache creation tokens and web search requests when usage reports them
treat built-in hosted provider defaults and catalog aliases as known-cost models
seed provider and model context when the sidecar starts after session configuration
preserve provider identity across provider/model switches via turn_context
edgeCases: same model slug under hosted and local providers
token_count payload carrying explicit provider/model overrides
token_count payload carrying cache creation and web search usage
response model differs from configured turn model
OpenAI, OpenRouter, Anthropic, and other built-in provider defaults
turn_context emitted after a provider switch
commands: npm run test --workspace=@tetsuo-ai/runtime -- src/session/cost.test.ts src/session/event-log.test.ts src/llm/providers/anthropic/adapter.test.ts src/llm/providers/openai/adapter.test.ts src/llm/grok/adapter.test.ts src/phases/stream-model.test.ts src/session/turn-context.test.ts

requiredBehaviors: format one-line cost summaries for status surfaces
format multi-line total-cost summaries for exit display
mark summaries when unknown model pricing was encountered
surface the registered CostSidecar summary through the immediate status command
provide a disposable process-exit summary hook without adding a React dependency
edgeCases: status command without a cost sidecar

requiredBehaviors: load missing cost totals as an empty non-degraded state
treat corrupt or schema-invalid totals as recoverable diagnostics
save lifetime cost totals atomically
append final session usage during sidecar shutdown
persist provider/model usage buckets inside each new session record
persist cache creation tokens and web search request counts
preserve existing current-session totals when disk save fails
edgeCases: same model slug persisted under hosted and local providers
manager stop unsubscribing before later events
